title: Tunisian Tagine Chicken
description: A rich and flavorful North African stew made with chicken, vegetables, and aromatic spices.
instructions: Season the chicken breast with salt and set aside.
Heat the olive oil in a large clay or ceramic pot over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the tagine spice mix and stir to combine.
Add the chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
Stir in the creamy yogurt and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
